issue_title: Mask with space do not backspace on Firefox
issue_body_preview:
When I have spaces after a special character, it doesn't work fine in firefox. Like if I try to backspace and has this space after a special character, it doesn't work.

Mask: (000) 000-0000

In firefox if I backspace then it get stuck on the space after the ). You need to move the cursor to the
test_description_zh: 在 Firefox 浏览器中，使用掩码格式为 (000) 000-0000 的输入框，完整输入一组电话号码（如 1234567890），然后连续按 Backspace 键逐个删除字符，观察光标在经过右括号 ')' 后面的空格时的退格行为。
expected_result_zh: 连续按 Backspace 键时，光标应能顺畅地通过空格和特殊字符（如括号），逐步删除所有已输入的数字，不会卡在空格处无法继续退格。
